message:
fix(api/connector): scope test-only imports behind cfg(test), extend session termination to accept Expired state, and add policy checkpoint append validation test

operator_routes.rs:
- Move AtomicUsize, Mutex, and OnceLock imports behind #[cfg(test)]
  gates so they are only compiled in test builds, reducing unused-import
  warnings in release mode.

session_auth.rs:
- Update AuthenticatedSession::terminate() docstring and semantics to
  correctly reflect that termination is valid from Active, Terminating,
  OR Expired states (previously only documented Active and Terminating).

policy_checkpoint.rs:
- Add test_append_accepts_valid_checkpoint_and_updates_chain_state()
  which validates the full lifecycle of appending a valid checkpoint:
  correct sequence assignment, parent hash linkage, chain length update,
  head hash propagation, chain verification, and proper event emission
  with PCK_001_CHECKPOINT_CREATED code.
- Minor formatting cleanup: collapse multi-line assert! into idiomatic
  single expression for latest_for_channel Custom channel test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
